profile_basis: Post-pass115 RCH fj-lax profile on ts2 ranked eval/fft_batch_128x1000_complex128 third by absolute time at 16.613 ms [16.583, 16.649], after matmul_2d_512 and eig_48. Matmul bit-exact GEMM micro-architecture levers have been repeatedly rejected, and eig/linalg.rs had peer WIP, so the clean profile-backed surface was fj-lax/src/fft.rs.
kept_lever: BluesteinPlan now owns fixed-size Radix2Plan forward/inverse execution plans. Each Radix2Plan precomputes the bit-reversal permutation and the exact same per-stage twiddle recurrence values that radix2_fft_1d_into generated inside every row. Bluestein rows reuse those planned radix-2 FFTs for the chirp convolution forward/inverse transforms.
baseline_command: RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/rch-frankenjax-pass116-fft-baseline cargo bench -p fj-lax --bench lax_baseline -- 'eval/(fft_batch_128x1000_complex128|fft_1000_complex128|fft_256_complex128|rfft_batch_64x1000_f64)' --sample-size 20 --measurement-time 2 --warm-up-time 1 --noplot
rebench_command: RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/rch-frankenjax-pass116-fft-candidate cargo bench -p fj-lax --bench lax_baseline -- 'eval/(fft_batch_128x1000_complex128|fft_1000_complex128|fft_256_complex128|rfft_batch_64x1000_f64)' --sample-size 20 --measurement-time 2 --warm-up-time 1 --noplot

benchmarks.note: Power-of-two eval_fft path does not use BluesteinPlan and stayed effectively flat/slightly faster, so the batched non-power-of-two win is not worker-speed noise.

isomorphism_proof: Ordering is unchanged: Radix2Plan's bit_reversed vector is produced by the same swap algorithm as bit_reverse_permute, and apply_into runs the same stage, block, and offset loop order as radix2_fft_1d_into.

Floating-point output is bit-identical for the radix-2 transform: the stored twiddle table is generated by the same sin_cos step and recurrence values previously regenerated inside each stage. Butterfly multiply/add/sub order is unchanged; the inverse 1/n scaling loop is unchanged.

Bluestein chirp construction, symmetric conj-chirp kernel, pointwise fa*fb product, inverse convolution FFT, chirp post-multiply, and inverse scaling are unchanged. Only the radix-2 FFT's permutation/twiddle schedule is hoisted into a reusable plan.
eval_fft/eval_rfft output dtype, shape, row-major output push order, and error/fallback surfaces are unchanged. Non-Bluestein power-of-two FFTs still use radix2_fft_1d_into directly.
No RNG, sorting, tie-breaking, transform ordering, or external state is touched.
